# dnacenter_interface_update (Data Source)

It performs update operation on Devices.

- Add/Update Interface description, VLAN membership and change Interface admin status ('UP'/'DOWN') from Request body.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "dnacinterface_update" "example" {
  provider        = dnac
  deployment_mode = "string"
  interface_uuid  = "string"
  admin_status {

    type = "string"
  }
  description {

    type = "string"
  }
  item {

    properties {

      # task_id = ------
      url {

        # type = ------
      }
    }
    # required = [------]
    # type = ------
  }
  vlan_id {

    type = "string"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- **interface_uuid** (String) interfaceUuid path parameter. Interface ID

### Optional

- **admin_status** (Block List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--admin_status))
- **deployment_mode** (String) deploymentMode query parameter. Preview/Deploy ['Preview' means the configuration is not pushed to the device. 'Deploy' makes the configuration pushed to the device]
- **description** (Block List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--description))
- **id** (String) The ID of this resource.
- **vlan_id** (Block List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--vlan_id))

### Read-Only

- **item** (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--item))
